routineText:
09:00 — Wake up
09:00–13:00 — Work & Water (1L)
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar
14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
· whole wheat bread 70g
· 3 eggs with olive oil 10g
· mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
· cumin & salt
14:00–18:00 — Work & Water (1L)
18:00 — Out from work
18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
· brown rice boiled (70g raw)
· kefta cooked (250g raw) with 1/2 onion
· 200g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)
19:00 — Black coffee · Water 1L
19:00–21:00 — Rest
21:00 — 🌙 Dinner
· 1 scoop of protein powder
· 2 perly nature
· 20g mixed nuts (almonds, walnuts, pistachios)
01:00 — Sleep
